nasb.text: “Arise, go to Zarephath, which belongs to Sidon, and stay there; behold, I have commanded a widow there to provide for you.”

esv.text: “Arise, go to Zarephath, which belongs to Sidon, and dwell there. Behold, I have commanded a widow there to feed you.”

cnv.text: “你起來，往西頓的撒勒法去，住在那裡；我已經吩咐那裡的一個寡婦供養你。”

ccb.text: “你去西顿的撒勒法，我已吩咐那里的一个寡妇供养你。”
